title: Delegated legislation
summary: 9084 — orders in council, statutory instruments, bylaws, and controls.
learningObjectives: Define delegated legislation and parent Acts.
Distinguish orders in council, statutory instruments, bylaws.
Evaluate advantages and disadvantages of delegation.

simpleExplanation.title: Law made by others
simpleExplanation.summary: Parliament grants powers to ministers and local bodies to make detailed rules — faster and expert-led, but with less democratic scrutiny.

sections.content: **Delegated legislation** (1.1.3) — balance **efficiency vs accountability** in essays.
